hero_subtitle: The all-in-one platform built for Iraqi gyms. Track members, manage subscriptions, monitor revenue — from a beautiful dashboard designed for your team.
features_subtitle: Purpose-built tools for gym owners — from onboarding the first member to managing hundreds of active subscriptions.
f1_desc: Add, edit, search and view every gym member. Full profiles with contact details, subscription history, and payment records.
f2_desc: Create unlimited plans with custom durations and pricing for Fitness and Bodybuilding. Plans auto-fill member forms on selection.
f3_desc: Instantly see who's Active, Expiring Soon (within 7 days), or already Expired — with real-time counts on every tab.
f4_desc: Track amount paid per member and see total gym revenue. Monthly stats and income breakdowns by exercise type.
f5_desc: Super admins manage unlimited gyms from a single dashboard. View all gyms, members, and stats in one place.
f6_desc: Renew any expired subscription in seconds. Plans pre-fill with the member's existing details so renewal is just two clicks.
f7_desc: Full bilingual support with proper RTL layout for Arabic. Switch languages instantly without losing any data.
f8_desc: A comfortable interface in any environment. The dashboard theme persists across sessions for every user.
how_subtitle: From application to first member added — the whole setup takes less than a day.
s1_desc: Fill out the online registration form with your gym name, location, and contact details. Takes less than 3 minutes.
s1_detail: No paperwork. No waiting in line.
s2_desc: Our super admin team reviews your application and approves your gym within 24 hours. You'll get immediate dashboard access.
s3_desc: Log in, add your subscription plans, and start registering members right away. Your gym is live from day one.
s3_detail: Full control from the first login.
cta_subtitle: Join the growing list of Iraqi gyms using FitNex to manage their members, plans, and revenue — all from one dashboard.
footer_tagline: A modern gym management platform built for Iraqi gyms. Manage your members, plans, and revenue — all in one place.
future_subtitle: We're constantly evolving. Here's a preview of powerful features arriving soon to take your gym to the next level.
future_note: Have a feature request? We'd love to hear from you.
ff1_desc: Automatic gate and turnstile control. Active members gain instant entry — expired memberships are stopped at the door.
ff2_desc: Members walk in and are recognized instantly. No cards, no phones — just their face. Powered by advanced facial recognition.
ff3_desc: Full entry and exit history for every member. See who checked in today, this week, or any custom date range.
ff4_desc: Automated WhatsApp and SMS reminders for expiring memberships, renewals, and important gym announcements.
